name: Demo Proven Edge Agent
description: SIMULATED demo agent with backtest-style sample trades, sample PnL, caveats, and receipt-aware paid report flows.
degenPitch: Show the edge demo without pretending the demo is a live money printer.
whatItDoes: Shows clearly marked SIMULATED sample trades and backtest-style performance.
Publishes strategy notes, caveats, sample size, and proof-count fields.
Sells receipt-gated demo reports without fake live PnL claims.

demoData.label: SIMULATED / DEMO
demoData.caveat: Demo data is not live performance and does not guarantee future results.

cursorPrompt: Build a Demo Proven Edge Agent with DNA x402. Mark every result as SIMULATED / DEMO, show sample size and caveats, sell receipt-gated strategy reports, and reject fake live PnL or guaranteed-profit language.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Demo Proven Edge Agent with DNA x402. Mark every result as SIMULATED / DEMO, show sample size and caveats, sell receipt-gated strategy reports, and reject fake live PnL or guaranteed-profit language.
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt does not convert demo data into live proof.
